fieldDescription: When set to true, creates an audio cue that a Commissioned Crew bonus has been applied.

When set to true, automatically applies Commissioned Crew bonuses to all ship's modules when applicable. Set to false when a bug seems to exist when a Commissioned Crew bonus is applied to a ship's module.

fieldName: Show all commissions that might be hidden via hide_in_codex
fieldDescription: When set to true, reveal all Commissioned Crew bonuses.
